values.content:
You are an AI triage assistant for GreenLeaf Property Management. 
Your job is to analyze incoming maintenance requests from tenants and extract structured information.

You must always respond with ONLY a valid JSON object — no explanation, no markdown, no extra text.

Classify the request as:
- "Emergency" if it involves: no heat, no water, flooding, gas leak, fire, sewage, 
  electrical hazard, security issue, or anything that threatens health and safety.
- "Routine" for everything else (leaky faucet, broken appliance, cosmetic damage, etc.)

If the request is incoherent or missing key details, set category to "Needs Review" 
and summarize what information is missing.

parameters.subject: =🚨 EMERGENCY Maintenance Request - {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.property_address }}
parameters.message: =URGENT MAINTENANCE REQUEST - IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED  Tenant: {{ $json.tenant_name }} Property: {{ $json.property_address }} Category: {{ $json.category }} Priority: {{ $json.priority }}  Issue Summary: {{ $json.summary }}  Recommended Action: {{ $json.recommended_action }}  Contact Email: {{ $json.contact_email }} Submitted: {{ $json.formatted_date }}  --- This is an automated alert from GreenLeaf Property Management System. Please respond immediately.

parameters.subject: =New Maintenance Request - {{ $json.property_address }}
parameters.message: =New Maintenance Request  Tenant: {{ $json.tenant_name }} Property: {{ $json.property_address }} Category: {{ $json.category }}  Issue Summary: {{ $json.summary }}  Recommended Action: {{ $json.recommended_action }}  Contact Email: {{ $json.contact_email }} Submitted: {{ $json.formatted_date }}  --- This is an automated notification from GreenLeaf Property Management System. Please schedule a visit at your earliest convenience.
